import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # State quantities
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state quantities
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Success: pyramid on grid, not held, manhattan dist == 1 to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # Agent to pyramid distance
    dist_ap_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_ap_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)

    # Agent to square distance
    dist_as_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_as_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)

    # Phase 1: not holding → approach pyramid
    # Use potential shaping: reward for reducing distance to pyramid
    not_holding_both = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n)
    r_approach_pyr = jax.lax.select(
        not_holding_both,
        (dist_ap_s - dist_ap_n) / max_dist * 3.0,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Pickup milestone
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # Phase 2: holding → need to be adjacent to square to place pyramid there
    # Key insight: agent needs to be AT DISTANCE 1 from square, then putdown
    # So reward for getting close to square while holding
    holding_both = holding_s & holding_n
    r_approach_sq = jax.lax.select(
        holding_both,
        (dist_as_s - dist_as_n) / max_dist * 3.0,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Bonus when holding and standing adjacent to square (ready to place)
    # dist == 1 means agent is right next to square
    agent_adj_sq_n = holding_n & (dist_as_n >= 0.5) & (dist_as_n <= 1.5)
    r_adj_sq = agent_adj_sq_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0

    # Putdown reward
    putdown_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    putdown_near = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 2.5)
    putdown_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 2.5)
    r_putdown = (
        putdown_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 15.0
        + putdown_near.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
        + putdown_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)
    )

    # Success reward
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    # Persistent success signal: once placed adjacent, keep rewarding
    # This avoids the agent learning to place and then re-pick
    already_placed_adj = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n) & pyr_on_grid_s & pyr_on_grid_n
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    was_adjacent = (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)
    r_persistent = (already_placed_adj & was_adjacent).astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_pickup
        + r_approach_sq
        + r_adj_sq
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_persistent
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
